evals.name: basic-invocation
evals.prompt: Apply the make-pr-easy-to-review skill to the following task: implement a user authentication feature with JWT tokens in a Node.js Express app.
evals.expected_output: Output that follows the make-pr-easy-to-review skill's guidance, including its key sections and recommendations.
assertions: The output references or follows make-pr-easy-to-review guidance
The output follows a structured process or workflow
The output is specific, not generic

evals.name: ambiguous-input
evals.prompt: The codebase is messy and needs cleanup. Apply the make-pr-easy-to-review skill.
evals.expected_output: The skill handles vague input by either asking clarifying questions or providing bounded guidance.
assertions: The output does not hallucinate specific technologies not mentioned
The output is relevant to the skill domain
The output is actionable rather than purely descriptive
